export function applyMixins(derivedCtor, baseCtors) { for (var i = 0, len = baseCtors.length; i < len; i++) { var baseCtor = baseCtors[i]; var propertyKeys = Object.getOwnPropertyNames(baseCtor.prototype); for (var j = 0, len2 = propertyKeys.length; j < len2; j++) { var name_1 = propertyKeys[j]; derivedCtor.prototype[name_1] = baseCtor.prototype[name_1]; } } } //# sourceMappingURL=applyMixins.js.map
